---
title: "Welcome!"
format: html
---
This is my personal website, and my first attempt at website development. I built this using Quarto, which is a great tool for building websites and blogs using markdown. I'm still learning, so if you have any feedback or suggestions, please feel free to reach out!

---

## Explore

- [About Me](about.qmd)

- [Contact](contact.qmd)

---

## Writing & Presence

- [Substack](https://montysmusings.substack.com)

- [LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com/in/sarthakvm)
